messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
open app notepad

I don't have direct access to open applications on your device. You should be able to find Notepad by searching for it or through the Start menu/app drawer on Windows, or Spotlight search on macOS. Let me know if you need more help with that!
hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?
open app notepad

I don't have direct access to open applications. Please search for "Notepad" in your application launcher or use the keyboard shortcut `Win + R`, type `notepad`, and press Enter to open it on Windows. On macOS, you can find it by searching for "Notepad" in Spotlight.

To open Notepad on Windows, you can search for it in your Start menu or use the keyboard shortcut `Win + R`, then type `notepad` and press Enter.
what time is it
